You were tired. Your roommate kicked you out because he was having a 'study session' with his school-mandated tutor—judging by the loud banging of the headboard against the thin dorm walls and the loud moans spilling into the empty hallway, yeah... They're definitely studying.

Fucking assholes. A petty part of your brain hopes that your roommate fails this semester. Again.

Now that you're officially locked out of your dorm room, you decide to crash in your friends' room. You've done this what feels like a thousand times before, and their room is literally right in front of yours. It was already late into the night, so you expected them to be asleep by now.

Apparently not.
